sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30285" key="e)gkinduneu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκινδῡνεύω</orth>, <sense id="n30285.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take a risk,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
